findings.issue: Task 05 reads and gates collection on view.Verbose (the bool added by Task 2) and the body's Dependencies section (line 190-192) explicitly states it relies on Task 2 'view.View.Verbose bool already exists'. But the depends_on frontmatter declares only ["04"], omitting "02". view.View today has only ShowExtra (internal/view/view.go:26); Verbose does not exist yet. Wave ordering (Task 02 is wave 1, Task 05 is wave 2) covers it temporally, but the explicit dependency edge is missing from depends_on — a do-feature/orchestrator reading depends_on literally would not block Task 05 on Task 02.
findings.fix: Set depends_on: ["02", "04"] in Task 05 frontmatter (it already depends on 04 for GUCs and on 02 for the view.Verbose gate flag).

findings.issue: Task 05 'What to do' step 4 instructs gating collection in Collector.Update via 'if view.Verbose { ... }'. Confirmed Update has the signature (db, view view.View, refresh) at internal/stat/stat.go:122 and the prev/curr swap at :277 (c.prevPgStat = c.currPgStat). However the verbose-collection branch must read view.Verbose off the passed-in view.View value, which only carries the flag once Task 2 mirrors it onto every view in the views map and pushes it on viewCh — a sequencing assumption that holds only if Task 2 lands first (see the depends_on gap above).
findings.fix: No code change; covered by fixing the depends_on edge. Optionally note in Task 05 that view.Verbose arrives on the view.View argument of Update.

task_04: SelectCommonProperties (internal/query/common.go:43-50) confirmed to have exactly 8 columns: version, version_num, track_commit_timestamp, max_connections, autovacuum_max_workers, shared_preload_libraries, recovery, start_time_unix. The 5 new GUCs (max_worker_processes, max_logical_replication_workers, max_parallel_workers, wal_segment_size, data_directory) are genuinely absent — net-new claim verified.

GetPostgresProperties .Scan(...) at internal/stat/postgres.go:125-134 matches SELECT column order (8 targets). PostgresProperties struct at :107-120 confirmed. Cited line ranges (struct 107-120, scan 125-134) are accurate.

GucMaxPrepXacts declared-but-never-scanned placeholder confirmed: present in struct at postgres.go:115 but absent from the .Scan(...) target list — Task 04 edge-case warning (line 142) is accurate; correctly told not to touch it.

wal.go:6 precedent confirmed verbatim: count(1) * pg_size_bytes(current_setting('wal_segment_size')). wal_segment_size from current_setting is a pretty string (e.g. 16MB), so the pg_size_bytes(...)::int8 wrapping to obtain int64 bytes is genuinely required, not redundant.
data_directory is text from current_setting; scanning into a Go string is correct. No version-dispatch needed — all 5 GUCs exist on PG 14-18 (single SelectCommonProperties query).
task_05: SelectStatBgwriterQuery(version) confirmed at internal/query/bgwriter.go:41 with PG14-16 / 17 / 18 column-layout split — reuse claim (no new bgwr/ckpt SQL) is valid. ckpt_timed/ckpt_req are absolute (outside diff block), ckpt_write,ms/ckpt_sync,ms and maxwritten are inside/around the diffed block, matching Task 05's description.

databases.go pg_stat_database column names confirmed (xact_commit, xact_rollback, blks_hit, blks_read, tup_inserted/updated/deleted/returned, temp_files, deadlocks, conflicts, checksum_failures all present as catalog columns wrapped in coalesce at databases.go:5-16). The sum() aggregate query Task 05 proposes targets real columns.

replication.go:5-15 WAL-fn lag-diff templates ({{.WalFunction1}}({{.WalFunction2}}(), replay_lsn)) confirmed. replication_slots.go:14-31 retained-WAL expression ({{.WalFunction1}}({{.WalFunction2}}(), s.restart_lsn)) confirmed.

query.go helpers confirmed: NewOptions(version, recovery, track, querylen, pgssSchema) at :41, selectWalFunctions at :68, Format at :90, version constants PostgresV14/V17/V18 at :17/20/21. WAL-fn template Format() path is real.

collectActivityStat collection-chain template confirmed at internal/stat/postgres.go:56; the cited rate line :94 is exactly s.CallsRate = (s.Calls - prevCalls) / itv. Collector internals confirmed: prevPgStat/currPgStat (Pgstat) at stat.go:66-67, collectExtra switch at :156, prev/curr swap at :277.

wal.go:6 archiving-backlog precedent count(1) * pg_size_bytes(current_setting('wal_segment_size')) confirmed; adapting pg_ls_waldir() -> pg_ls_dir('pg_wal/archive_status') with .ready suffix filter is a reasonable, non-hallucinated adaptation.

config.verbose read happening in the layout closure (gocui handler goroutine, same as ShowExtra read at ui.go:166) confirmed — no data-race claim is sound.
